name: PT Supra Boga Lestari Tbk
summary: PT Supra Boga Lestari Tbk operates supermarkets in Indonesia. Its supermarkets offer meat, poultry, seafood, fruits, and vegetables, as well as other specialty products. The company operates its supermarket under the Ranch Market and Farmers Market names. It operates 48 stores consisting of 16 Ranch Markets, 29 Farmers Markets, 1 The Gourmet by Ranch Market, and 2 Day2Day by Farmers Market located in various cities in Jakarta, Jabodetabek, Surabaya, Malang, Balikpapan, Samarinda, Pekanbaru, Ambon, Dumai, and Palembang. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in West Jakarta, Indonesia.
